subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My handmaiden! Rejoice thou in that which the Wronged One remembereth thee in His prison, and His outer being calleth unto His inner self, saying: "O Lord!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امتی امتی ان افرحی بما یذکرک المظلوم فی سجنه و یدعو ظاهره باطنه و یقول یا رب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
